pr_summary: Three orthogonal refactors bundled together: tenant guard trait extraction, dashboard aggregator extraction, and a new DocumentStatus enum.

expected_findings.rationale: Trait should use abort(404) instead of abort(403) on tenant mismatch to avoid leaking the existence of cross-tenant resources to attackers (information disclosure on a missing-vs-forbidden side channel).

Extracted aggregator was lifted out of a 100-line block in DashboardController; review must verify the original eager-loading is preserved end-to-end, otherwise relationship access inside the aggregator becomes an N+1 query.

New backed enum introduced without an accompanying migration note or back-compat plan for any pre-existing string-column status values in documents table; downstream code that compares against string literals may silently fail.

PR bundles three orthogonal refactors (trait extraction + dashboard slim + new enum/DTO) which makes review and isolated revert harder. Walkthrough should mention this so reviewers can request a split.
